LandingPage.title: Stop dreaming, start building
LandingPage.description: Forge turns your ideas into real web systems in minutes – no coding experience required.

Auth.signInDesc: Use your Google account to start building.

Onboarding.techLevelDesc: This helps us adjust how much we explain to you.
Onboarding.level_beginner_desc: I have never coded before, or very little.
Onboarding.level_intermediate_desc: I know basic concepts like HTML or variables.
Onboarding.level_comfortable_desc: I have used programming languages before, explain it quickly.
Onboarding.projectTitle: What do you want to build?
Onboarding.projectDesc: Select one of the starter projects to learn Forge.

Summary.title: Great job!
Summary.subtitle: You completed this step. Here's what you learned:

Features.feature1_desc: You say what you want, and the AI writes the code step by step.
Features.feature2_desc: Forge explains the code in plain English so you understand how your web system works.
Features.feature3_desc: See the results immediately and share your web system with friends or customers.

HowItWorks.title: How Forge Works
HowItWorks.step1_desc: Forge starts by asking you about your project and explains the technology we'll use in the first step.
HowItWorks.step2_desc: The AI writes precise code and builds your interface in real-time. You watch it happen.
HowItWorks.step3_desc: Instead of just giving you the final result, Forge breaks down the code and explains exactly how everything fits together.

Pricing.title: Simple Pricing & Credits
Pricing.subtitle: Forge uses a flexible Credit system. Standard chats and explanations cost 1 credit, while complex code generation requires more. This ensures you always get maximum performance at a fair price.
Pricing.pro_feature2: Build your own web systems from scratch

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.q1: Do I need to know how to code?
FAQ.a1: No, Forge takes care of that for you and teaches you along the way.
FAQ.q2: What happens if I get stuck?
FAQ.a2: Our AI explains exactly what it's doing in plain English. If you don't understand, you can click the 'Why?' button.
FAQ.a3: You only pay for what you use with our credit system. Trial is free, but deploying large web systems may require a Pro plan.
FAQ.q4: Can anyone see my web system?
FAQ.a4: Yes, when you click 'Deploy', your project connects to Vercel and goes live on a public URL in seconds.
